channel.title: Category-Theory on Script Adults
channel.description: Recent content in Category-Theory on Script Adults

item.title: Understanding Yoneda lemma
item.description: The Yoneda Lemma The Yoneda lemma has been being complainted as “hard to understand” for a long time. Indeed it is not very easy, so I was trying to come up with a way to understand it more intuitively. Everyone knows the analogy by Ravi Vakil: You work at a particle accelerator. You want to understand some particle. All you can do are throw other particles at it and see what happens.

item.title: The double dual trick to construct a better object from the existing one
item.description: Stone–Čech compactification One of the proof of the Stone–Čech compactification is to consider the continuous functions from a given topological space $X$ to $[0, 1]$. Crux 1: constructing $[0, 1]^{C}$ Let $C$ be the space of all continuous functions from $X$ to $[0, 1]$, consider $[0, 1]^{C}$, there is a natural map from $X$ to $[0, 1]^{C}$: for each $x \in X$, define $\phi(x) = f \mapsto f(x)$. With product topology $\phi$ is continuous.
